# PureWay OC

> Medical-grade whole-house water filtration for Orange County, CA homes. Free water test, same-day response, lifetime warranty. Powered by Toppen Health Disruptor PAC technology delivering 99.99% contaminant removal.

## About

PureWay OC provides medical-grade residential water filtration in Orange County, California. The company uses Toppen Health Disruptor PAC (Powered Activated Carbon) technology — delivering 99.99% contaminant removal, a standard typically reserved for medical and laboratory settings. Services: whole-house filtration, water softeners, reverse osmosis, commercial water treatment, free in-home water testing.

Contact: (949) 998-9443 | purewayoc@gmail.com | https://purewayoc.com

## Services

- [Whole-House Water Filtration](https://purewayoc.com/services/whole-house-filtration): Medical-grade whole-house systems using Toppen Health Disruptor PAC. 99.99% contaminant removal. Lifetime warranty.
- [Water Softeners](https://purewayoc.com/services/water-softeners): Eliminates hard water scale. Orange County water tests 12-20 GPG — hard to very hard. Protects appliances, plumbing, and fixtures.
- [Reverse Osmosis](https://purewayoc.com/services/reverse-osmosis): Under-sink RO for premium drinking water. Removes lead, arsenic, fluoride, nitrates, PFAS, and TDS from OC water.
- [Free Water Testing](https://purewayoc.com/services/free-water-testing): Free in-home water analysis for Orange County homes. Same-day response. No obligation.
- [Commercial Water Treatment](https://purewayoc.com/services/commercial): High-capacity systems for Orange County restaurants, offices, and businesses.
- [Well Water Treatment](https://purewayoc.com/services/well-water): Custom treatment for private well water in Orange County and surrounding areas.
- [Pricing](https://purewayoc.com/pricing): Transparent pricing for all PureWay OC services.
- [Certifications](https://purewayoc.com/certifications): WQA, NSF 42/53/55, CSA certifications and Toppen Health partnership details.

## Water Quality — Orange County, CA

- OC water hardness: 12-20 GPG — hard to very hard (Groundwater District blended with MWD imports)
- Primary concerns: hardness, chloramines, PFAS, TDS, chromium-6
- Orange County uses chloramines for disinfection — requires specialized catalytic carbon filtration

## Key Facts

- Medical-grade Toppen Health Disruptor PAC technology
- 99.99% contaminant removal rate
- Lifetime warranty on all systems
- Same-day response across Orange County
- Free in-home water test — no obligation
